summary: The session provided a recap of the first 10 minutes of a sales call involving Matt Brown from Fellow and several representatives from a client company, including Eric Cameron and Nick Sarkesian. Key topics included the potential use of Fellow for organization-wide one-on-ones, security aspects, integrations with Okta and Workday, and the differences between Fellow's Pro and Enterprise plans.
facts: Matt Brown is an account executive at Fellow. Eric Cameron is the VP of People Operations at the client company. Nick Sarkesian is the Director of Business Applications at the client company. Trina Berks is a Technical Program Manager at the client company. Lucas Cooper is a Business Applications Manager at the client company. The client company is exploring Fellow as a potential platform for organization-wide one-on-ones. Matt Brown explained that the Enterprise plan of Fellow is designed for company-wide deployments and offers robust security and integrations. Fellow can serve as a single source of truth for tracking OKRs and other important information. Nick Sarkesian inquired about the process for uploading and managing OKRs within Fellow. Matt Brown agreed to send over security documentation, integration information, and an NDA as a follow-up to the conversation.
